title: Synthesis of new 1-(phthalimido)substituted-aziridine-2-carboxylates
author: M. B. Deshmukh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Shivaji University, Kolhapur-416 004, India 

  Manuscript received 8 January 1999, revised 10 May 1999, accepted 3 June 1999  

 Synthesis of new N-amidoaziridines by using aziridinating reagent, N-aminophthalimide (1) has  been  reported. The intermediate generated in the lead tetraacetate oxidation (1) is not the N-nitrene (2) but N-acetoxyphthalimide (3) which brings about aziridination of olefins.
steps_raw:
